name: Pitcher_Mech

infobox.Systems: Hydraulic Lifter(Prime)EffectThrow an adjacent unit and damage it. (Starts with 2-tile range)(1 damage)Upgrade I+2 Range ()Increases the range of the throw by 2.Upgrade II+2 Damage ()Increases damage to the target by 2.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theCataclysmsquad.
sections.Strategy:
Because Hydraulic Lifter deals damage to units when they land, its most basic use is to toss targets onto cracked tiles, causing grounded enemies to fall instantly. Since the Pitcher Mech starts with 4HP, it can also be positioned to block enemy attacks and spawns itself; look for angles where it can also throw an enemy to get maximum value for its actions.
The+2 Rangeupgrade in particular is a helpful unlock after theDrill Mechsdamage is upgraded, so the Pitcher Mech can throw enemies into chasms and other environmental effects from as many angles as possible. Look for other environmental effects such as desert or forest tiles as well, if a cracked tile is not withing range. Enemies can also be tossed to intercept other enemy projectiles or block spawns. If using the Pitcher Mech in aCustom Squad, look for Mechs that can provide environmental damage or statuses, such as theNano Mechto deal double damage on enemies thrown intoA.C.I.D. Pools.
Hydraulic Lifter faces limitations similar toJudo Mech'sVice Grip: the weapon itself cannot be used if there is no unoccupied tile for the target to land on, and so the target must be thrown from the right direction. For this reason, Pitcher Mech benefits from extra move and pilots that grants movement bonuses, such asHenry KwanorProspero. Being stable units,Burrowersare also unable to be targeted by Hydraulic Lifter; so a secondary weapon or other ally mechs should be used to deal with these enemies.
sections.Trivia:
- The Pitcher Mech is the only Mech in the game that starts with 4 Health points.
  - The Pitcher Mech is featured in the cover art of theadvanced edition soundtrack by Ben Pruntyalongside the Drill Mech. The Album Art was made byPedro Medeiros, also known for art on the video games Celeste and Tower Fall.
sections.Gallery: - Cover of theadvanced edition soundtrack by Ben Prunty, album art byPedro Medeiros.

Team
[
]
The mech is available as part of the
Cataclysm
squad.
Strategy
[
]
Because Hydraulic Lifter deals damage to units when they land, its most basic use is to toss targets onto cracked tiles, causing grounded enemies to fall instantly. Since the Pitcher Mech starts with 4HP, it can also be positioned to block enemy attacks and spawns itself; look for angles where it can also throw an enemy to get maximum value for its actions.
The
+2 Range
upgrade in particular is a helpful unlock after the
Drill Mechs
damage is upgraded, so the Pitcher Mech can throw enemies into chasms and other environmental effects from as many angles as possible. Look for other environmental effects such as desert or forest tiles as well, if a cracked tile is not withing range. Enemies can also be tossed to intercept other enemy projectiles or block spawns. If using the Pitcher Mech in a
Custom Squad
, look for Mechs that can provide environmental damage or statuses, such as the
Nano Mech
to deal double damage on enemies thrown into
A.C.I.D. Pools
.
Hydraulic Lifter faces limitations similar to
Judo Mech
's
Vice Grip
: the weapon itself cannot be used if there is no unoccupied tile for the target to land on, and so the target must be thrown from the right direction. For this reason, Pitcher Mech benefits from extra move and pilots that grants movement bonuses, such as
Henry Kwan
or
Prospero
. Being stable units,
Burrowers
are also unable to be targeted by Hydraulic Lifter; so a secondary weapon or other ally mechs should be used to deal with these enemies.
Trivia
[
]
The Pitcher Mech is the only Mech in the game that starts with 4 Health points.
The Pitcher Mech is featured in the cover art of the
advanced edition soundtrack by Ben Prunty
alongside the Drill Mech. The Album Art was made by
Pedro Medeiros
, also known for art on the video games Celeste and Tower Fall.
